__comment__: Settings localization key rules: 1) main setting key is derived from setting.id by replacing '.' with '_' (example: Xz3r0.XFitView.Delay -> Xz3r0_XFitView_Delay); 2) keys inside options must exactly match the actual option values used in code (including case).

Xz3r0_XFitView_WorkflowEnterMode.name: Workflow Enter Mode
Xz3r0_XFitView_WorkflowEnterMode.tooltip: Choose when to auto-fit view when loading main workflow (page load, load workflow file)

options.First: First time only (resets on page refresh)

Xz3r0_XFitView_WorkflowExitMode.name: Workflow Exit Mode
Xz3r0_XFitView_WorkflowExitMode.tooltip: Choose when to auto-fit view when exiting subgraph back to main workflow

options.First: First time only (resets on page refresh)

Xz3r0_XFitView_SubgraphEnterMode.name: Subgraph Enter Mode
Xz3r0_XFitView_SubgraphEnterMode.tooltip: Choose when to auto-fit view when entering subgraphs

options.First: First time only (resets on page refresh)

Xz3r0_XFitView_SubgraphExitMode.name: Subgraph Exit Mode
Xz3r0_XFitView_SubgraphExitMode.tooltip: Choose when to auto-fit view when exiting subgraphs (returning to parent subgraph)

options.First: First time only (resets on page refresh)

Xz3r0_XFitView_Delay.name: Fit View Delay (ms)
Xz3r0_XFitView_Delay.tooltip: Delay before fitting view (milliseconds). Increase if view doesn't fit correctly. Range: 0-2000ms

Xz3r0_XDataHub_Enabled.name: Enable ♾️ XDataHub (Button)
Xz3r0_XDataHub_Enabled.tooltip: Show floating window button [♾️] in the top-menu bar

Xz3r0_XDataHub_UnderSidebar.name: Place ♾️ XDataHub below ComfyUI UI layers
Xz3r0_XDataHub_UnderSidebar.tooltip: When enabled, XDataHub is rendered below ComfyUI UI components (not only sidebars). Panels and tools around the viewport may cover window content or controls (Maximize/Close).

Xz3r0_XDataHub_DefaultOpenLayout.name: XDataHub Default Open Layout
Xz3r0_XDataHub_DefaultOpenLayout.tooltip: Default window layout when opening XDataHub.

Xz3r0_XDataHub_WindowCloseBehavior.name: XDataHub Close Button Behavior
Xz3r0_XDataHub_WindowCloseBehavior.tooltip: Hide: faster reopen, higher memory. Destroy: lower memory, slower reopen.

Xz3r0_XDataHub_Hotkey.name: XDataHub Toggle Hotkey
Xz3r0_XDataHub_Hotkey.tooltip: Keyboard shortcut to toggle the XDataHub window. Format: Ctrl+Alt+X, Alt+X, Shift+F2, etc.

Xz3r0_XDataHub_VideoAutoplay.name: Video Preview - Autoplay
Xz3r0_XDataHub_VideoAutoplay.tooltip: Automatically play video when previewing in XDataHub.

Xz3r0_XDataHub_VideoMuted.name: Video Preview - Muted
Xz3r0_XDataHub_VideoMuted.tooltip: Mute video by default when previewing in XDataHub.

Xz3r0_XDataHub_VideoLoop.name: Video Preview - Loop
Xz3r0_XDataHub_VideoLoop.tooltip: Loop video playback when previewing in XDataHub.

Xz3r0_XDataHub_AudioAutoplay.name: Audio Preview - Autoplay
Xz3r0_XDataHub_AudioAutoplay.tooltip: Automatically play audio when previewing in XDataHub.

Xz3r0_XDataHub_AudioMuted.name: Audio Preview - Muted
Xz3r0_XDataHub_AudioMuted.tooltip: Mute audio by default when previewing in XDataHub.

Xz3r0_XDataHub_AudioLoop.name: Audio Preview - Loop
Xz3r0_XDataHub_AudioLoop.tooltip: Loop audio playback when previewing in XDataHub.

Xz3r0_XDataHub_StoreLoraDbInLoras.name: Store Lora DB in models/loras
Xz3r0_XDataHub_StoreLoraDbInLoras.tooltip: Save the Lora trigger-word database inside models/loras instead of XDataHub's data folder.

Xz3r0_XDataHub_CustomMediaFolder.name: Custom Media Folder Path
Xz3r0_XDataHub_CustomMediaFolder.tooltip: Absolute path to an extra folder to browse in XDataHub media tabs. Leave empty to disable.
